scripts.build: sha="$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" || exit 1; [ -n "$sha" ] || { echo "wtw build: cannot resolve git short SHA; refusing to build without an embedded SHA" >&2; exit 1; }; bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --banner='#!/usr/bin/env node' --define WTW_GIT_SHA="\"$sha\""
